qa_pairs.question: Can I request an increase in CPU or GPU resources when applying through the Fast Track process?
qa_pairs.answer: No, an increase in CPU or GPU requests is not allowed through the Fast Track application process. You may only request up to the amount specified in your invitation email. If you need more compute resources, you must submit a new application.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of information should be provided in the 'Progress report' section of the Fast Track application form?
qa_pairs.answer: The 'Progress report' section, which is a required component of the Fast Track application form, should include details about what has been accomplished with the resources used, such as publications.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have questions about the Fast Track application process?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have any questions regarding the Fast Track process, you should send an email to allocations@tech.alliancecan.ca.
